budget_month_plan_lines_kind_check.name: budget_month_plan_lines_kind_check
budget_month_plan_lines_kind_check.value:
(
        ("budget_month_plan_lines"."income_line_id" IS NOT NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_line_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_category_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."line_kind" = 'income')
        OR ("budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_line_id" IS NOT NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."income_line_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_category_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."line_kind" = 'expense')
        OR ("budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_category_id" IS NOT NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."income_line_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."expense_line_id" IS NULL AND "budget_month_plan_lines"."line_kind" = 'expense_category')
      )
